content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

delta.text: The device is stuck on the lock screen (keyguard_
root_view) and cannot be dismissed via swipe/click. After mult
iple unlock attempts (swipe up, click, press home
/back), the screen remains in AOD/keyguard state
showing the date "5月1日 周五" and
time. Without password input capability, I cannot proceed past the keyguard,
so the task cannot be executed.

content.text: The device is stuck on the lock screen (keyguard_root_view) and cannot be dismissed via swipe/click. After multiple unlock attempts (swipe up, click, press home/back), the screen remains in AOD/keyguard state showing the date "5月1日 周五" and time. Without password input capability, I cannot proceed past the keyguard, so the task cannot be executed.

ked at keyguard_root_view, AOD showing 5月1日 周五 16
